title: armeria maritima subsp. legionensis
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. legionensis, also known as the Sea Pink or Legion Sea Thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The Sea Pink is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
